layout.sidebar: collapsible left sidebar, 280px expanded, 80px collapsed. Solid background (#FFFFFF) with 1px right border (#E2E8F0).
layout.topbar: sticky header, height 64px, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px bottom border (#E2E8F0).
layout.spacing_scale: generous padding for readability (p-6 inside cards).

components.buttons: rounded-md, sharp corners (no pill shapes), robust padding (px-4 py-2), clear hover states. Use primary for main action, outline/ghost for secondary.
components.badges: rounded-sm px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold border. Color based on states.
components.tables: Shadcn UI table, full width, left-aligned columns, sticky header if long. Hover effect on rows (hover:bg-slate-50).
components.forms: Shadcn UI forms. Labels text-sm font-medium text-slate-700. Inputs rounded-md border-slate-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary.
components.dialogs: Shadcn dialog, backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/40. Modal surface white, rounded-md, shadow-lg, p-6.

motion.hover_effects: slight translateY(-1px) on cards, background darken on buttons, color shift on text links.

login_background.description: Abstract modern office building, geometric patterns, use with a heavy slate-900/80 overlay.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast ratio. Gray text must be slate-600 minimum on white.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install @phosphor-icons/react and use it for all icons.
Apply IBM Plex Sans font to the entire project.
Implement the Layout Shell: Sidebar (collapsible) and Topbar (sticky).
The Dashboard must use the F-Pattern F-Pattern F-Pattern Information Architecture, placing the most critical 'total trámites' and 'fuera de tiempo' metrics in the top-left.
Use the 'states' color palette strictly for trámite badges.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Do NOT use soft, rounded UI (keep rounded-md maximum).
Ensure the login page uses the provided login_background image with a dark overlay to maintain text readability.
